/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING/INTC/X:PRELIMINARY HEARING IS VACATED,/X:AS PARTOF A NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION, THE PEOPLE MOVE TO DISMISS THIS CASE PURSUANTTO PC 1385,/MO GRTD/X:THE DEFENDANT ENTERS A HARVEY WAIVER,/X: ANY RESTITUTION OR STAY AWAY ORDERS RESULTING FROM DISMISSED CHARGES MAY BE ADDED ASTERMS AND CONDITIONS OF THE SENTENCE IN COURT NO 20009650 OR 20012593,/
